---
title: 'Framed Art'
date: '2012-06-16T05:53:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4958843831726368489'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/framed-art.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Art'
---

<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/"><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />Home</a><br />
<br />
<br />
<h2 style="text-align: center;">

&nbsp;Framed Art</h2>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1312-6739a111f479.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="300" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1312-02becc47e71c.jpg" width="400" /></a></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1305-44f52a2317a9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1305-2f7ae3447a5f.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1307-6809b9718135.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1307-15591a7324f4.jpg" width="200" /></a><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1309-7e61ef874882.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1309-e696b9aed3d8.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1310-0c3f565dbfa4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1310-baebc628c013.jpg" width="200" /></a><br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1317-36b7e6bb8009.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="300" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1317-cad54f456d91.jpg" width="400" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1315-1e93e83b9c0f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1315-c4b2bcf5b208.jpg" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1314-72441a73c7dd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1314-6f908cb1c517.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!</div>
<div>
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe></div>
